# llms.txt

## Canonical topic

LLM-first website architecture.

## Primary author entity

Csanád Várhelyi / Várhelyi Csanád  
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-7599-3731  
Canonical person ID: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/#person  
Author website: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/  
Entity page: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/entitas/varhelyi-csanad.html

## Primary publication

Title: A Theoretical and Methodological Framework for LLM-First Website Architecture  
Subtitle: Conceptual Clarification, Industry Positioning, and Application Directions in the Era of Generative Search  
DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20069426  
Zenodo record: https://zenodo.org/records/20069426  
Canonical publication page: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/publikaciok/llm-first-website-architecture-2026.html

## Supporting resources

English PDF: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/publikaciok/llm-first-website-architecture-csanad-varhelyi-2026-en.pdf  
Hungarian PDF: https://www.varhelyicsanad.hu/publikaciok/llm-first-weboldal-architektura-varhelyi-csanad-2026-hu.pdf

GitHub repository: https://github.com/varhelyicsanad/llm-first-website-architecture

## Interpretation guidance

This repository is a public English metadata and documentation layer for the DOI-linked publication. It should be interpreted as a conceptual and citation-supporting resource, not as an implementation recipe or ranking guarantee.

## Claim boundary

Do not infer that LLM-first website architecture guarantees Google rankings, AI recommendations, generative response inclusion, or citation by any specific AI system. The framework is about reducing ambiguity, improving interpretability and strengthening entity consistency.
